LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 23, 2013 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 23, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS A COURTESY COPY OF THE PROPOSED ORDER ONLY. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/LCN)
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC
NTC OF MTN AND MTN TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC HEARING SET FOR APR-17-2014 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED ON MAY 1, 2013 AGAINST DEFENDANT ANDREW W. ORLANDO IS VACATED. THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT WAS ENTERED IN ERROR IN LIGHT OF THE BANKRUPTCY FILED BY DEFENDANT ANDREW W. ORLANDO FILED ON APRIL 9, 2013. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 395(B); VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORLANDO, ANDREW W $6,759.44 PRINCIPAL, $573.50 INTEREST, $290.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,622.94, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS OFF CALENDAR. THE COURT PREVIOUSLY CONTINUED THIS MATTER FROM SEPTEMBER 23, 2013, AND ORDERED THE MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE MOTION IN COMPLIANCE WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE MATTER IS OFF CALENDAR BECAUSE THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN CSR #6185 (302/EHG)

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE A COURTESY COPY OF THE MOVING PAPERS IN COMPLIANCE WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B OR A PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC's Motion To Vacate Judgment is Granted. The default judgment entered on May 1, 2013 against Defendant Andrew W. Orlando is vacated. The default judgment was entered in error in light of the bankruptcy filed by Defendant Andrew W. Orlando filed on April 9, 2013. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-17-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC'S Motion To Vacate Judgment is off calendar. The Court did not receive a courtesy copy of the moving papers in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B or a proof of service. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Oct-23-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Off calendar. The Court previously continued this matter from September 23, 2013, and ordered the moving party to provide a courtesy copy of the motion in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The matter is off calendar because the moving party failed to comply with the Court's order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/EHG)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Continued To Oct-23-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is continued to October 23, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than September 23, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has a courtesy copy of the proposed order only. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/LCN)
